name: Cerence Inc.
business: Cerence builds conversational and agentic AI solutions for the mobility/transportation market, primarily automotive. It sells software licenses and cloud-connected services to nearly all major automobile OEMs worldwide. Its solutions are white-label, enabling customers to customize virtual assistants.

exposures.sentence: Our software platform offers a hybrid architecture combining edge software components, which are embedded in a vehicle's head unit and integrated with onboard systems, with cloud-connected components.

While the majority of our business is in the automotive market, our solutions can be leveraged across other areas of transportation - two-wheeled vehicles, trucks, and more - as well as outside of automotive.
Cybersecurity and data privacy incidents or breaches may damage client relations and inhibit our growth.

catalysts.sentence: The implementation of the 2025 Plan is expected to be substantially complete by the end of the first quarter of fiscal year 2026.
